# API Workaround Checklist: SPEC-008 Perspectives

**Purpose**: Validate that requirements adequately address OmniJS API risks, version-gating, fallback behaviors, and accurate documentation of API verification status for all Perspective tools.
**Created**: 2026-03-18
**Feature**: specs/008-perspectives (research.md, data-model.md, quickstart.md, contracts/)

**Note**: This checklist is generated by the `/speckit.checklist` command based on feature context and requirements.

## Requirement Completeness -- API Surface Coverage

- [ ] CHK001 - Does the spec document that `Perspective.Custom.all` returns ONLY custom perspectives and explicitly excludes built-in perspectives? [Completeness, RT-001]
- [x] CHK002 - Are the built-in perspectives `Nearby`, `Completed`, and `Changed` addressed in requirements, given the official OmniJS docs list them alongside the 6 in `BUILT_IN_PERSPECTIVE_NAMES`? [Gap, perspective-identifier.ts] -- RESOLVED: Added note to spec Key Entities section: "Nearby" is iOS-only; "Completed" and "Changed" are internal views accessible only via menu, not sidebar perspectives. All three excluded from BUILT_IN_PERSPECTIVE_NAMES.
- [ ] CHK003 - Is the read-only nature of `Perspective.Custom.name` and `Perspective.Custom.identifier` properties documented in requirements? [Completeness, RT-001]
- [ ] CHK004 - Are requirements specified for what `byName()` returns when multiple custom perspectives share the same name? [Completeness, RT-001]
- [ ] CHK005 - Does the spec document that `Perspective.BuiltIn` does NOT support `byIdentifier()` or `byName()` lookup methods? [Completeness, RT-008]

## Requirement Clarity -- API Verification Status

- [ ] CHK006 - Is the `iconColor` property clearly documented as VERIFIED in the official OmniJS API (omni-automation.com) with version tag v4.5.2, rather than flagged as unverified? [Clarity, RT-003]
- [ ] CHK007 - Is the constraint that `iconColor` does NOT apply when a perspective uses a custom icon explicitly stated in requirements? [Clarity, RT-003]
- [ ] CHK008 - Are `archivedFilterRules` and `archivedTopLevelFilterAggregation` clearly documented as VERIFIED APIs available from v4.2+, with their property types specified? [Clarity, RT-002]
- [ ] CHK009 - Is the `fileWrapper()` return type clearly specified as `FileWrapper` (not a raw binary or string)? [Clarity, RT-004]
- [ ] CHK010 - Is the `document.windows[0].perspective` setter behavior documented as accepting both `Perspective.BuiltIn.*` enum values and `Perspective.Custom` objects? [Clarity, RT-005]

## Requirement Consistency -- Version Gating

- [ ] CHK011 - Are version gate thresholds consistent across all references: `iconColor` at v4.5.2+, `archivedFilterRules`/`archivedTopLevelFilterAggregation` at v4.2+? [Consistency, RT-002, RT-003]
- [ ] CHK012 - Is the version-gating pattern (`app.userVersion.atLeast(new Version('X.Y'))`) consistently referenced for all version-gated properties? [Consistency, quickstart.md Step 5]
- [ ] CHK013 - Are the null-return semantics for version-gated properties consistent: `filterRules` returns `null` below v4.2, `iconColor` returns `null` below v4.5.2? [Consistency, data-model.md]
- [ ] CHK014 - Does the `PerspectiveListItemSchema` consistently omit `iconColor` from list responses even though it is available on `Perspective.Custom` objects? [Consistency, perspective-summary.ts]

## Acceptance Criteria Quality -- Fallback Behaviors

- [ ] CHK015 - Are measurable acceptance criteria defined for what `list_perspectives` returns when OmniFocus version is below v4.2 (no `filterAggregation`)? [Acceptance Criteria, list-perspectives.ts]
- [ ] CHK016 - Are acceptance criteria defined for the `set_perspective_icon` tool when invoked on OmniFocus below v4.5.2, including the expected error code `VERSION_NOT_SUPPORTED`? [Acceptance Criteria, set-perspective-icon.ts]
- [ ] CHK017 - Are acceptance criteria specified for `export_perspective` when the target directory does not exist, including the expected error code `INVALID_DIRECTORY`? [Acceptance Criteria, export-perspective.ts]
- [ ] CHK018 - Are acceptance criteria defined for `switch_perspective` when no OmniFocus windows are open, including the expected error code `NO_WINDOW`? [Acceptance Criteria, switch-perspective.ts]

## Scenario Coverage -- Lookup and Disambiguation

- [ ] CHK019 - Are requirements defined for the identifier-takes-precedence-over-name behavior when both are provided to `PerspectiveIdentifierSchema`? [Coverage, perspective-identifier.ts]
- [x] CHK020 - Are disambiguation scenarios specified for when a custom perspective name matches a built-in perspective name (e.g., a custom perspective named "Inbox")? [Coverage, Gap] -- RESOLVED: Added edge case to spec: custom and built-in perspectives are searched separately (built-in matched first against well-known list, then custom via byName()). No namespace collision because they are different types with different lookup paths.
- [ ] CHK021 - Is the case-insensitive matching behavior for built-in perspective names documented with specific examples? [Coverage, RT-008]
- [x] CHK022 - Are requirements defined for `get_perspective` when lookup by identifier returns `null` but name matches a built-in perspective? [Coverage, Gap] -- RESOLVED: Per lookup precedence rule, identifier-based lookup only searches custom perspectives. If identifier returns null, it is NOT_FOUND -- name is not used as fallback when identifier is provided. This is documented in Lookup Behavior table and edge cases.

## Edge Case Coverage -- Export and FileWrapper

- [ ] CHK023 - Is the behavior specified for `fileWrapper()` when the perspective has no custom icon (plist-only content vs plist + image attachments)? [Edge Case, RT-004]
- [x] CHK024 - Are requirements defined for what `writeFileRepresentationIntoDirectory()` returns when the file already exists at the target path? [Edge Case, Gap] -- RESOLVED: Out of scope. We use `fileWrapper()` to obtain export data. The `saveTo` path writes a new file; overwrite semantics are controlled by OmniFocus internally. Documented in data-model.md Notes section.
- [ ] CHK025 - Is the `.ofocus-perspective` file extension explicitly documented as the expected output format? [Completeness, RT-004]
- [ ] CHK026 - Are requirements specified for the metadata-only response when `saveTo` is omitted from `export_perspective`, including what `fileName` and `fileType` values are expected? [Edge Case, export-perspective.ts]

## Edge Case Coverage -- Icon Color

- [ ] CHK027 - Are requirements defined for hex color shorthand expansion (3-digit `#RGB` to 6-digit `#RRGGBB`, 4-digit `#RGBA` to 8-digit `#RRGGBBAA`)? [Edge Case, data-model.md Validation Rules]
- [ ] CHK028 - Is the float conversion formula (channel / 255 = 0.0-1.0) documented for the CSS hex to `Color.RGB(r, g, b, a)` transformation? [Clarity, RT-003]
- [x] CHK029 - Are requirements specified for reading back `iconColor` after setting it (round-trip fidelity of color values)? [Edge Case, Gap] -- RESOLVED: Added edge case to spec: the tool returns the CSS hex value that was requested, not the value read back from OmniFocus. Exact round-trip fidelity is not guaranteed due to color space conversion.
- [x] CHK030 - Is the behavior defined for setting `iconColor` on a perspective that currently uses a custom icon image? [Edge Case, Gap] -- RESOLVED: Added edge case to spec: iconColor and custom icon image are independent properties. Setting iconColor on a perspective with a custom icon applies it as a tint. Setting one does not clear the other.

## Edge Case Coverage -- Window and Perspective Switching

- [ ] CHK031 - Is the idempotency of `switch_perspective` documented (switching to the already-active perspective is a no-op)? [Edge Case, RT-005]
- [ ] CHK032 - Are requirements specified for the `switch_perspective` response when switching to a built-in perspective vs a custom perspective? [Coverage, switch-perspective.ts]
- [ ] CHK033 - Is the `document.windows[0]` assumption documented with rationale for why the frontmost window is always index 0? [Assumption, RT-005]
- [x] CHK034 - Are requirements defined for multi-window scenarios (tabbed windows, multiple windows) and which window receives the perspective switch? [Edge Case, Gap] -- RESOLVED: Added edge case to spec and assumption: always uses `document.windows[0]` (primary/frontmost window). Multi-window scenarios are out of scope.

## Non-Functional Requirements -- Error Handling

- [ ] CHK035 - Are error response formats consistent across all 5 tools (discriminated union on `success` field with optional `code` and `candidates`)? [Consistency, contracts/]
- [ ] CHK036 - Is the `BUILTIN_NOT_EXPORTABLE` error code for `export_perspective` paired with a human-readable error message requirement? [Completeness, export-perspective.ts]
- [ ] CHK037 - Is the `BUILTIN_NOT_MODIFIABLE` error code for `set_perspective_icon` clearly distinguished from `VERSION_NOT_SUPPORTED`? [Clarity, set-perspective-icon.ts]
- [x] CHK038 - Are partial failure scenarios addressed for tools that operate on single items (not batch), or is this explicitly scoped out? [Coverage, Gap] -- RESOLVED: Documented in data-model.md Notes: all 5 perspective tools operate on a single item (not batch). Single-item tools return either success or error. Partial failure does not apply.

## Dependencies and Assumptions

- [ ] CHK039 - Is the assumption that `Perspective.Custom.all` is always available (no version gate) validated against official API docs? [Assumption, RT-001]
- [ ] CHK040 - Is the assumption that `document.windows` is always non-empty on macOS validated, or are headless/background execution scenarios addressed? [Assumption, RT-005]
- [x] CHK041 - Is the dependency on OmniFocus Pro for custom perspectives documented (custom perspectives require Pro license)? [Dependency, Gap] -- RESOLVED: Added to spec Assumptions section and Edge Cases: OmniFocus Pro required for custom perspectives. Standard license users get empty custom lists and NOT_FOUND for custom perspective lookups.
- [ ] CHK042 - Are the `escapeForJS()` helper dependency and its role in preventing OmniJS injection documented in requirements? [Dependency, quickstart.md]

## Notes

- Check items off as completed: `[x]`
- Add comments or findings inline
- Items CHK002, CHK020, CHK022, CHK024, CHK029, CHK030, CHK034, CHK038, CHK041 -- all gaps resolved during remediation pass (2026-03-18)
- Research confirmed: `iconColor` (v4.5.2+), `archivedFilterRules` (v4.2+), `fileWrapper()`, `document.windows[0].perspective` setter are ALL verified in official OmniJS API documentation at omni-automation.com
